title: centrogenium roseoalbum
side_effects: Centrogenium roseoalbum can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts may lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its toxins can cause liver damage and kidney failure. In severe cases, using centrogenium roseoalbum without proper guidance can result in anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention. It is crucial to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy to avoid these potential side effects.
